title: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
summary_full: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.
summary_public: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products
